name: Qualifying Cardiac Event Diagnosis Codes
description: ICD-10-CM codes for qualifying cardiac events including acute myocardial infarction, old MI, presence of coronary bypass grafts, coronary angioplasty implants, and heart failure. Used in cardiac rehabilitation and post-cardiac event follow-up quality measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets
